title: trachelium jacquinii subsp. rumelianum
intro: Trachelium jacquinii subsp. rumelianum, also known as the Turkish trachelium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant's roots and leaves have been traditionally used to treat conditions such as indigestion, diarrhea, and coughs, due to their anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe the digestive system and relieve congestion. The herbal preparations of Trachelium jacquinii subsp. rumelianum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
